## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Verification

- [ ] `scripts/Test-Package.ps1` passes
- [ ] Normal Codex surface verified when DOM/CSS changed
- [ ] Settings surface verified when DOM/CSS changed
- [ ] Restore path verified when launcher/runtime changed

## Privacy and provenance

- [ ] No runtime logs, personal paths, account data, usage values, task content, or private screenshots
- [ ] New assets and external facts have source and license notes
- [ ] Native Codex interactions remain authoritative

## Compatibility and risk

List tested Codex versions, known gaps, and rollback steps.
